meaning: n.[物]光敏性,感光性 感光灵敏度
examples: The characteristics of infrared films of a new generation with increased photosensitivity are presented.
The sulfur plus gold sensitization causes the photosensitivity of this nanoparticle AgBrI emulsion to rise.
A novel dual-wavelength fiber Bragg grating (FBG) fabricated by using photosensitivity is experimentally demonstrated.
